description: Salesforce Contact or Account to Workday Worker or Organisation. HR system of record sync.
criticalRules: Workday REST API requires OAuth 2.0 — token endpoint: https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/oauth2/{tenant}/token
Workday tenant name must be in every API URL — comes from config not payload
PUT to update existing worker, POST to create — check existence first
Workday worker ID (WID) is the internal identifier — must be retrieved before update
Phone numbers must include country dialing code in Workday format
Workday job profile and position must exist before worker can be created
Date format for Workday: yyyy-MM-dd (ISO, no time component)

keyMappings.Position_Data.Job_Profile_Reference.ID: from config — must exist in Workday

authPattern: OAuth 2.0 Client Credentials: POST https://{tenant}.workday.com/ccx/oauth2/{tenant}/token with client_credentials grant
dateConversion: fun toWorkdayDate(d) = if (d != null and d != '') d[0 to 9] else null
commonFailures: Tenant URL wrong: must be exact tenant name, case-sensitive
WID not found: worker must be looked up by integration ID before PUT
Job profile not found: must be pre-populated in Workday before sync
Token expiry: Workday tokens expire — refresh before each batch
